headline: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES PARTNERSHIP WITH AMERICA250 AND UNVEILS INDEPENDENCE ONE IN CELEBRATION OF GIVING PEOPLE THE FREEDOM TO FLY FOR 55 YEARS
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) celebrates the 250th anniversary of the nation's founding with the introduction of Independence One, a special new livery from the airline that is known for democratizing the skies. Independence One will join two additional Southwest® America-themed planes—Freedom One, which has been in the fleet since 2021, and Liberty One, a second newly-introduced aircraft painted in an American flag theme.

headline: Mag 7 Earnings On Deck: AI Monetization And Leadership Transitions Take Center Stage This Week
summary: All eyes turn to the Mag 7 this week as the companies report Q1 2026 results. The S&P 500 is projected to deliver its sixth consecutive quarter of double-digit earnings growth at 15.1%.

headline: Why Southwest Airlines (LUV) Is Down 7.6% After Q1 Profit Rebound and Major Buyback - And What's Next
summary: In April 2026, Southwest Airlines Co. reported first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$7.25 billion and net income of US$227.0 million, a reversal from a net loss a year earlier, alongside guidance for flat to slightly higher capacity and significantly higher unit revenues in the second quarter. The company also completed a major share repurchase of 37,538,504 shares and highlighted strong customer uptake of new offerings like assigned seating and extra legroom, underscoring how...
